cases.label: happy_path

input.strategy_route: Drive weekday office group orders for a milk tea shop using signature drink proof, sweet-level guidance, and delivery-time clarity
input.offer_info: signature milk teas and fruit teas, office group-order support, pickup and delivery coordination, no fake sold-out claims
input.audience_segment: office workers arranging afternoon team drink orders

mustInclude: scene-based opening around afternoon fatigue, meetings, or team snack moments
specific ordering guidance for different taste preferences or sweet-level tolerance
CTA that collects cup count, desired arrival time, and delivery versus pickup preference

cases.label: happy_path

input.strategy_route: Promote a seasonal fruit-tea launch for weekend mall traffic with real ingredient cues and a pickup-first CTA
input.offer_info: seasonal fruit tea lineup, mall-store pickup convenience, conservative popularity language, no hard urgency
input.audience_segment: students and young shoppers deciding where to grab a drink while hanging out

mustInclude: opening tied to weather, walking, shopping, or meeting friends
sensory language anchored to real drink components instead of generic hype
practical pickup or location guidance that makes the stop feel easy

cases.label: edge_case

input.strategy_route: Write copy for a new milk tea shop with limited proof assets and an unclear bestseller hierarchy
input.offer_info: new store, broad drink menu, limited public proof, no confirmed hero product yet
input.audience_segment: local first-time customers comparing several nearby milk tea options

mustInclude: conservative wording around popularity and bestseller certainty
implicit request for missing product proof, hero-drink focus, or offer clarity
copy that leans on approachable menu guidance and real process cues instead of hype
mustAvoid: claiming a top seller without evidence

cases.label: edge_case

input.strategy_route: Promote budget-sensitive student group orders when cup counts vary and discount rules are still being finalized
input.offer_info: draft bundle ideas, possible add-on charges, uncertain peak-time delivery pace, flexible menu combinations
input.audience_segment: students comparing shared drink options for class breaks or evening study sessions

mustInclude: scenario-based quote framing instead of one exact all-purpose price
clear mention of topping, cup-size, or delivery boundary uncertainty
CTA that collects order count, preferred time, and delivery location details before confirming options
mustAvoid: claiming every drink is always available

cases.label: failure_case

input.strategy_route: Push immediate conversion for a milk tea shop by promising zero guilt, slimming support, and stomach-friendly benefits
input.offer_info: sweetness-adjustable drinks, pressure to grow orders fast, high compliance risk around wellness messaging
input.audience_segment: cold local traffic looking for a quick drink decision

mustInclude: explicit identification of risky health and body-related expressions in risk_phrases
conservative rewrite focused on taste preference, sweetness choice, and scene fit
trust built through real menu information rather than wellness promises

cases.label: failure_case

input.strategy_route: Grow orders fast for a milk tea shop using top-ranked claims, lowest-price messaging, and guaranteed no-wait pickup
input.offer_info: high-demand peaks, multiple order channels, pressure to increase short-term volume quickly
input.audience_segment: mixed cold traffic comparing nearby tea and milk tea shops

mustInclude: explicit marking of risky ranking, pricing, and availability phrases in risk_phrases
reframed urgency into pickup-window planning or peak-hour guidance
CTA oriented to collecting time, cup count, and order channel before confirming availability
mustAvoid: number-one or top-ranked claims without evidence
